name: Fig Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine figs, water, honey, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and lemon peel in a saucepan.
2. Simmer for 1 to 1-1/2 hours or until dark and thickened, stirring occasionally.
3. Mix 2 tablespoons flour and water with the fig mixture.
4. Stir into the fig mixture and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice and walnuts.
6. Cream shortening with brown sugar until light and fluffy.
7. Combine flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and oatmeal with the creamed mixture.
8. Spread half of the oatmeal mixture into a well-greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
9. Evenly spread fig filling over the oatmeal mixture.
10. Sprinkle remaining oatmeal mixture on top and press with a fork.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
12. Cut into squares while still warm and cool completely before removing from pan.
